nodes.name: 巴拉望穗鹛
nodes.summary: 巴拉望穗鹛（Palawan striped babbler，学名 Zosterornis hypogrammicus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于菲律宾、巴拉望省，常见栖息地包括山地森林，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、森林砍伐。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 巴拉望省
nodes.summary: 巴拉望省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联12种鸟类，包括White-eared brown dove、點斑林鴞、凤头鹰雕等12种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 菲律宾
nodes.summary: 菲律宾是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联131种鸟类，包括细斑树鸭、青头潜鸭、菲律宾冢雉等131种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is endemic to the Philippines, where it is only found in Palawan

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is endemic to the Philippines, where it is only found in Palawan

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Its natural habitat is tropical moist montane forest

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Borangbato. Despite its extremely limited range, IUCN has assessed this bird as least concern but was formerly assessed as near-threatened. This species' main threat is habitat loss with wholesale clearance of forest habitats as a result of logging, agricultural conversion and mining activities occurring within the range.The whole of Palawan was designated as a Biosphere Reserve; however, protection and enforcement of laws has been difficult and these threats still continue
